<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Intervention\Gif\Blocks; use Intervention\Gif\AbstractEntity; use Intervention\Gif\Exceptions\FormatException; class DataSubBlock extends AbstractEntity { /** * Create new instance * * @throws FormatException */ public function __construct(protected string $value) { if ($this->getSize() > 255) { throw new FormatException( 'Data Sub-Block can not have a block size larger than 255 bytes.' ); } } /** * Return size of current block */ public function getSize(): int { return strlen($this->value); } /** * Return block value */ public function getValue(): string { return $this->value; } }
